text:
Drawbridge (lit. , rom. Kyassuru Gēto) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It protects the caster against a single short-range regular spell used by another player.
__NOTOC__

Summary

It allows the caster to protect themselves against a single spell card cast by another player. It needs to be used before the player gets hit with the spell. After use the card is destroyed.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1019 :: 
他のプレイヤーからの近距離攻撃呪文を１度だけ防ぐ。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1019 :: Drawbridge 
Protects against a Short-Range Attack Spell from a player once.
|}

Trivia

"Drawbridge" is among the cards Goreinu gave to Team Tsezguerra in Chapter 171, and the only one not to be a transport spell.
